overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running along a forest trail at dusk. The scene transitions from a dark wooded path to an open area with a large visible moon and vibrant purple sky, then through a grove of white flowering trees toward a red wooden settlement gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail at dusk with wooden fencing

events.description: large moon becomes visible through the tree canopy ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging along a dirt path through a dark forest with wooden fences lining the route

entered.detail: rough wooden fence running alongside the left of the path
small wooden cottage with warm light visible through the trees on the left
tall birch trees with white bark lining the right side of the path
massive pale moon becoming visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow forest trail at dusk, with wooden fences lining the dirt path. A cottage with warm lighting is visible through the trees on the left. As Geralt runs forward, the large moon becomes visible through the canopy ahead, signaling a transition to a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside trail under large moon with rocky terrain

events.description: sky transitions from dark blue to vibrant purple and pink sunset hues
approaching grove of white flowering trees lining the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the path with the large moon prominently visible overhead and colorful sky

entered.detail: rocky hillside terrain with exposed stone on the left side of the path
trees with bright white blossoms lining the right side of the trail
vibrant purple and pink colored clouds in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up to reveal a wide sky dominated by a massive pale moon. The sky transitions to vibrant purple and pink hues as Geralt runs past rocky outcrops. White flowering trees begin to appear along the right side of the path, replacing the birch trees from earlier.

scene_state.functional_zone: flowering tree grove with wooden settlement gate

events.description: approaching red wooden gate structure with hanging banners marking settlement entrance
tree canopy temporarily obscures the moon from view

agents.ego_description: running through the flowering grove toward a wooden settlement gate with red painted structures and hanging banners

entered.detail: large red-painted wooden gate structure marking the settlement entrance
wooden archway with hanging decorations spanning the path
colorful banners and flags hanging from the gate structure

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs through a dense grove of white flowering trees that now line both sides of the path. Ahead, a red wooden gate with an archway and hanging prayer flags marks the entrance to a settlement. The moon becomes obscured by the tree canopy as the path leads directly toward the gate structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a dim forest trail into a vibrant, moonlit landscape that culminates at a settlement entrance. It begins on a narrow dirt path lined with wooden fences, passing a warmly lit cottage nestled among the trees. As the camera advances, the canopy breaks to reveal a massive pale moon set against a sky shifting into vibrant purple and pink hues, while the surrounding birch trees give way to rocky outcrops and white flowering flora. The scene then transitions into a dense grove of these white blossoms lining both sides of the path, before the moon is obscured by the foliage as the camera heads directly toward a red wooden gate adorned with hanging prayer flags.
